description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push. The workflow should have a BUILD_TYPE environment variable set to Release and trigger multiple jobs for building on different platforms and compilers, including Linux (GCC, GCC 5, Clang), Windows (MSVC 32-bit, MSVC 64-bit, MinGW, BCC32), and MacOS (Clang). Each job should check out the repository, install dependencies if needed, configure CMake, build the project, and upload artifacts.
